2155510.name: Psychonauts 2 (Original Soundtrack), Vol. 3
2155510.description: In Volume Three, we turn to dangerous dens of spy fiction, worlds of mystery, and mastermind's... minds! The psychedelic rock of Volume Two gives way to battle and boss music, Grulovian anthems, and revelations of years past. Volume Three is brash while dipping into moody mystique when you least expect it. It is, as they say, a land of contrasts; each as musically marvelous as the last.
